title: Integration Minute
prompt: Find me if you want one minute to name what you are taking from this party and how you want to remember it.
author: Wendell

wave.grow_up: Grow the moment into something someone can carry.

game_master.regent: Creates quests of belonging, culture, care norms, and being treasured in a held space. This face asks: what does this quest make more normal in the room?
game_master.sage: Sage: help the party become wisdom, not just experience.

title: Three Minute Treasure
prompt: Choose one person and spend three minutes making them feel luxuriously appreciated.
author: Party Deck

wave.wake_up: Notice who seems ready to receive attention.
wave.clean_up: Ask what kind of appreciation would feel good.
wave.show_up: Offer the appreciation and let it land.

game_master.challenger: Be brave enough to be direct.
game_master.shaman: Track the feeling in the room.
game_master.regent: Make the care feel part of the party culture.

title: Happy Apples
prompt: Name three tiny things that are genuinely good right now. Share one with someone nearby.
author: Emotional First Aid Kit

wave.clean_up: Find three specific apples, not a forced silver lining.

game_master.challenger: Do not dismiss the small thing.
game_master.diplomat: Offer your apple without requiring a response.
game_master.shaman: Let the nervous system taste the good.
game_master.regent: Let small joys become part of the room culture.
game_master.sage: Notice what changes after naming them.

title: Grounding Cord
prompt: Imagine a cord from your body into the earth. Breathe down the cord for one minute, then choose your next move.
author: Emotional First Aid Kit

wave.wake_up: Notice whether you are floating, rushing, or bracing.
wave.clean_up: Let excess charge move down the cord.
wave.grow_up: Remember that grounded choice is still choice.
wave.show_up: Take one next action from your body.

game_master.regent: Let grounding support belonging without taking over.
game_master.sage: Ask what is true from the ground.

title: Rose Tool
prompt: Picture a rose at the edge of your space. Let it mark the boundary between your feelings and the room.
author: Emotional First Aid Kit

wave.clean_up: Let the rose hold the boundary.
wave.show_up: Return to the party with your own center.

game_master.regent: Let boundaries protect the shared culture.

title: WAVE Check
prompt: Let one emotion arrive without fixing it. Name it, breathe with it, and ask what it wants you to know.
author: Emotional First Aid Kit

wave.grow_up: Ask what capacity it is requesting.

game_master.regent: Let emotional honesty become socially welcome.

title: 3-2-1 Mini
prompt: Choose a charged figure or thought. Say: there it is, you are, I am. Notice what comes back into you.
author: Emotional First Aid Kit

wave.clean_up: Speak to it instead of about it.
wave.grow_up: Own the part that is yours.

game_master.challenger: Tell the truth about the projection.
game_master.regent: Let integration make you more trustworthy in the room.
game_master.sage: Keep only what is actually yours.

title: Basic Qi Gong Reset
prompt: Stand, soften your knees, lift your arms on inhale, lower them on exhale. Do eight slow rounds.
author: Party Deck

wave.clean_up: Let breath and motion smooth the edges.

game_master.diplomat: Make space for bodies around you.
game_master.regent: Let regulation support the group field.

title: Partner Stretch Offer
prompt: Offer a consent-forward stretch, roller, or percussion-gun assist. Let the receiver set the pace.
author: Party Deck

wave.wake_up: Notice who might want body care.
wave.clean_up: Ask clearly and accept no easily.

game_master.shaman: Listen with your hands and eyes.
game_master.regent: Make body care feel held and honorable.
game_master.sage: Stop before it becomes too much.

title: Breath Reset
prompt: Try four rounds of box breathing: inhale four, hold four, exhale four, hold four. Then notice what changed.
author: Party Deck

game_master.diplomat: Do it privately or invite someone gently.

title: Get Tea With Wendell
prompt: Find Wendell at the party and claim a tea moment for decompression, integration, gossip, or care.
materials: Find Wendell, choose tea or a tea-equivalent
author: Wendell

wave.wake_up: Notice whether you want a live care conversation.
wave.clean_up: Name the kind of tea you want.
wave.grow_up: Let care happen while the party is alive.
wave.show_up: Find Wendell and claim the tea moment.

game_master.challenger: Ask for the kind of connection you want.
game_master.diplomat: Make the offer easy to accept or decline.
game_master.architect: Find a workable time and place at the party.
game_master.regent: Let a small ritual of care become part of the party.
game_master.sage: Know whether this is support, celebration, or reflection.
